title: Microsoft Patches Critical Zero-Day in MSHTML Under Active Exploitation (CVE-2026-11111)
summary: Microsoft has released an out-of-band security update addressing CVE-2026-11111, a critical remote code execution vulnerability in MSHTML that is being actively exploited in the wild. CVSS score: 9.8.

title: Microsoft Intune adds new app deployment policy for Windows 11 22H2
summary: Intune administrators can now configure scoped app deployment policies for Windows 11 22H2 devices, enabling granular control over application rollout sequences.

title: Apple releases Rapid Security Response for actively exploited WebKit vulnerability
summary: Apple has issued a Rapid Security Response (RSR) for iOS 17.5, macOS Sonoma 14.5 and iPadOS 17.5 to address a WebKit vulnerability (CVE-2026-22222) being actively exploited in targeted attacks.

title: Jamf Pro 11.6 released: new Declarative Device Management features for macOS Sequoia
summary: Jamf Pro 11.6 introduces expanded Declarative Device Management (DDM) support for macOS Sequoia, including new status reports for managed apps and improved compliance workflow integration.

title: iPhone 17 Pro Max: First hands-on review — titanium design, periscope camera and battery life
summary: We spent two weeks with the iPhone 17 Pro Max. Here is our full review covering the new titanium chassis, upgraded periscope zoom lens, and real-world battery performance in daily use.

title: Android Security Bulletin June 2026: Critical RCE in Bluetooth stack, CVSS 9.8
summary: The June 2026 Android Security Bulletin addresses a critical remote code execution vulnerability (CVE-2026-33333) in the Bluetooth stack with a CVSS score of 9.8. Device manufacturers are urged to push patches within 90 days.

title: Google expands Android Enterprise Zero-Touch Enrollment to 15 new OEM partners
summary: Google has announced the expansion of the Android Enterprise Zero-Touch Enrollment program to 15 additional OEM partners, simplifying large-scale device provisioning for enterprise IT administrators.

title: BSI warnt vor aktiver Ausnutzung kritischer Exchange-Schwachstelle
summary: Das BSI hat eine Warnung zu einer aktiv ausgenutzten kritischen Sicherheitslücke in Microsoft Exchange Server herausgegeben. Administratoren werden aufgefordert, sofort die verfügbaren Patches einzuspielen.

title: Heise: Warum Zero Trust im deutschen Mittelstand nach wie vor unterschätzt wird
summary: Eine aktuelle Studie zeigt, dass nur 23% der deutschen Mittelstandsunternehmen ein vollständiges Zero-Trust-Framework implementiert haben. Experten erklären, warum der Ansatz dennoch unverzichtbar ist.

title: Samsung Galaxy S25: Testbericht — Display, Kamera und Performance im Detail
summary: Wir haben das Samsung Galaxy S25 ausgiebig getestet. Im Mittelpunkt unseres Tests stehen das neue Dynamic AMOLED-Display, die verbesserte Kamera mit 200-MP-Sensor und die Gaming-Performance.

title: CISA adds five vulnerabilities to Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog
summary: CISA has added five new vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, including critical flaws in Cisco IOS XE, Ivanti Connect Secure, and Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS.

title: NowSecure: New research reveals credential leakage in popular mobile VPN apps
summary: NowSecure researchers have identified credential leakage vulnerabilities in three widely-used mobile VPN applications affecting both iOS and Android platforms. Enterprise deployments are particularly at risk.

title: Microsoft Surface Pro 11 jetzt für 799€ — nur bis Sonntag!
summary: Sichern Sie sich jetzt das Microsoft Surface Pro 11 zum Aktionspreis von 799€. Das Angebot gilt nur bis Sonntag und solange der Vorrat reicht. Perfekt für unterwegs!

title: Intego entdeckt neuen macOS-Backdoor der in legitimen Notarization-Prozess eingeschleust wird
summary: Intego-Forscher haben eine neue macOS-Malware entdeckt, die sich als legitime notarisierte Applikation tarnt und nach Installation einen Remote-Access-Backdoor installiert.

title: Azure Active Directory: Produktupdate — neue bedingter Zugriff-Richtlinienvorlagen
summary: Microsoft hat neue vorgefertigte Vorlagen für den bedingten Zugriff in Entra ID (ehemals Azure AD) veröffentlicht, die Best-Practice-Konfigurationen für häufige Szenarien wie BYOD und privilegierten Zugriff abdecken.

title: Azure outage: service degradation affecting authentication in West Europe
summary: Multiple customers report Entra ID and Azure AD authentication failures in West Europe and North Europe regions. Microsoft is investigating. Workaround: use backup authentication flows.

title: Entra ID sign-in failures reported across multiple M365 tenants in EU regions
summary: Users in EU tenants are unable to authenticate via Entra ID. MFA and conditional access policies are timing out. Incident EX123456 opened.

title: MC123456: Upcoming changes to SharePoint site creation permissions in M365
summary: Starting July 2026, non-admin users will no longer be able to create new SharePoint sites by default. Admins can re-enable this capability via the SharePoint Admin Center.

title: MC234567: New conditional access templates available in Entra ID admin center
summary: Microsoft is rolling out 12 new conditional access policy templates in Entra ID to simplify Zero Trust deployments. Templates cover phishing-resistant MFA, compliant device requirements, and insider risk.

title: MSRC: Critical RCE vulnerability in Exchange Server under active exploitation (CVE-2026-33333)
summary: An unauthenticated RCE in Exchange Server 2019 and 2016 is being exploited by multiple threat actors. Microsoft released an OOB patch. No workaround available — patch immediately.

title: MSRC Patch Tuesday June 2026: 78 CVEs, 9 Critical including Windows Kernel EoP
summary: June 2026 Patch Tuesday addresses 78 CVEs. Nine are rated Critical, including a Windows Kernel EoP (CVE-2026-44444, CVSS 8.8) and a Hyper-V RCE (CVE-2026-55555, CVSS 9.0) that are actively exploited.

title: MSRC Patch Tuesday April 2026: 65 CVEs, none under active exploitation
summary: April 2026 Patch Tuesday closes 65 vulnerabilities, including 7 rated Critical. No CVEs are known to be under active exploitation. Standard patching cadence recommended.

title: MC345678: Microsoft Teams new meeting recap feature rolling out to GCC tenants
summary: Teams intelligent meeting recap is now available for GCC customers. AI-generated summaries, speaker timeline, and action item detection are included.

title: Azure Active Directory renamed to Microsoft Entra ID — admin portal update guide
summary: Microsoft has completed the rename of Azure Active Directory to Microsoft Entra ID. This article walks admins through updated portal locations, PowerShell module names, and API endpoints.

title: MC456789: Deprecation of Basic Authentication for Exchange Online — final deadline extended
summary: Microsoft extends the Basic Authentication deprecation deadline for SMTP AUTH and IMAP/POP3 by 6 months to January 2027 for tenants with documented dependencies.

title: Android Security Bulletin June 2026: Critical RCE in Bluetooth stack (CVE-2026-77777, CVSS 9.8)
summary: The June 2026 Android Security Bulletin addresses a Critical RCE in the Bluetooth stack that can be triggered without user interaction. Affected: Android 12, 13, 14, 15. OEM patches expected within 30 days.

title: Samsung Security Maintenance Release June 2026: 42 CVEs patched for Galaxy fleet
summary: Samsung SMR June 2026 addresses 42 CVEs including 4 Critical, affecting Galaxy S, Galaxy A, and Tab series running Android 13 and 14. Critical includes Bluetooth and kernel privilege escalation.

title: Google expands Android Enterprise Zero-Touch Enrollment to new OEM partners
summary: Google announces Zero-Touch Enrollment support for 12 new OEM devices, including Zebra TC57x and Honeywell CT47. Enterprises can now streamline provisioning for these ruggedized devices.

title: Android 15 enterprise feature update: new DPC API for personal profile network isolation
summary: Android 15 introduces new Device Policy Controller APIs allowing EMM vendors to fully isolate work profile network traffic. Intune and VMware Workspace ONE have already updated their DPCs.

title: NowSecure finds critical privilege escalation in popular Android VPN app used in enterprise
summary: NowSecure disclosed a privilege escalation vulnerability in FortiClient VPN for Android (CVSS 8.9) that allows a malicious app to hijack VPN sessions. Update to version 7.2.4 immediately.

title: iOS 18.5 and macOS Sequoia 15.5: two actively exploited zero-days patched
summary: Apple patched CVE-2026-88888 (WebKit type confusion, in-the-wild) and CVE-2026-99999 (Kernel memory corruption) across all platforms. Apply update immediately.

title: Apple Rapid Security Response iOS 18.5.1: emergency patch for actively exploited CoreAudio flaw
summary: Apple released RSR iOS 18.5.1 to address CVE-2026-10101, a CoreAudio memory corruption vulnerability being exploited by a commercial spyware vendor in targeted attacks.

title: macOS Sequoia 15.5: Gatekeeper improvement and 38 security fixes
summary: macOS Sequoia 15.5 includes hardened Gatekeeper notarization requirements and 38 security fixes, none under active exploitation. Routine update recommended for managed fleets.

title: Apple Business Manager now supports Managed Device Attestation for iOS 18
summary: Managed Device Attestation (MDA) is now fully supported in Apple Business Manager, allowing MDM servers to verify hardware integrity of enrolled iOS and macOS devices during check-in.

title: Jamf Pro 11.7 adds compliance reporting for CIS macOS Benchmarks
summary: Jamf Pro 11.7 introduces built-in compliance reporting dashboards mapped to CIS macOS Sonoma and Sequoia benchmarks. Reports can be exported to CSV or integrated with Microsoft Sentinel.

title: Apple AirDrop vulnerability allows attackers to correlate device owners via Bluetooth (CVE-2026-11111)
summary: Researchers demonstrate a passive AirDrop attack that leaks hashed phone numbers and email addresses of nearby Apple devices. Affects all iPhones running iOS 17 and later. No patch yet.

title: OpenSSL 3.3.2 patches two high-severity memory corruption vulnerabilities
summary: OpenSSL 3.3.2 fixes CVE-2026-12121 (heap buffer overflow in X.509 parsing, CVSS 8.1) and CVE-2026-12122 (use-after-free in PKCS12 handling). Affects all major platforms. Rebuild dependent software.

title: Log4Shell successor: new RCE in popular Java logging library actively exploited
summary: A critical RCE (CVSS 10.0) in Logback, used as Log4j successor, is under active exploitation. Attackers are using it to deploy ransomware on unpatched enterprise Java applications.

title: CISA adds 5 CVEs to Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog including VMware vCenter RCE
summary: CISA added CVE-2026-13000 (VMware vCenter RCE, CVSS 9.8), CVE-2026-13001 (Cisco IOS XE auth bypass), and 3 other CVEs to the KEV catalog. Federal agencies must patch within 21 days.

title: NIS2 compliance guide for European enterprises: technical requirements and admin checklist
summary: ENISA published a practical NIS2 implementation guide covering logging requirements, incident reporting timelines, and mandatory security controls for operators of essential services.

title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra review: best Android camera phone of 2026
summary: We tested the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra for two weeks. The 200MP camera with improved night mode delivers stunning results. Battery life is excellent at 6500mAh.

title: Windows 11 Copilot+ PC deal: Microsoft Surface Pro 11 at 20% off this weekend
summary: This weekend only, Microsoft Store and Best Buy are offering 20% off the Surface Pro 11 Copilot+ PC. The deal includes Surface Pro Flex Keyboard at no additional cost.

title: Apple Vision Pro 2 leaked renders suggest lighter design and improved passthrough
summary: Leaked CAD renders of Apple Vision Pro 2 suggest a 15% weight reduction and improved micro-OLED passthrough resolution. Expected announcement at WWDC 2027.

title: Google Pixel 10 vs iPhone 17 Pro: which flagship camera phone should you buy?
summary: We compared the Google Pixel 10 and iPhone 17 Pro camera systems in 50 real-world scenes. The Pixel edges ahead in low light; the iPhone wins at video stabilization.

title: Crypto market rally: Bitcoin hits 120,000 USD as ETF inflows surge
summary: Bitcoin surpassed 120,000 USD for the first time as spot ETF inflows reached 3 billion USD in a single week. Analysts attribute the rally to institutional demand.
